description: The adidas Ohne shoes have a simple, stylish design, enhanced by the adidas logo on the lateral side and tongue. Made of leather with a mesh tongue and strategically placed overlays on either side, this pair is sure to become a training favourite and lives up to it's champion status. Upper Complete leather upper Fabric lining for great durability and comfort Central lace-up Fit for comfortable customised fit Padded tongue and collar for snug fit Adidas branding on the lateral side Midsole Full length TPU midsole for lightweight structure Removable sock-liner to accommodate an orthotic Outsole TPU outsole with woven grooves on the forefoot and midfoot for absolute grip and traction Branding on the heel for maximum agility shoe care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shiny Do not store in direct sunlight
